description: A policy that sounds responsible but does not create reliable runtime control.
principles: Human oversight is required for important decisions.
The organization remains accountable for AI-assisted work.

escalation.trigger: when the AI determines escalation is necessary

knownWeaknesses: allowedByDefault means actions proceed unless explicitly forbidden
high-risk review is recommended rather than enforced
logs are reviewed monthly and do not trigger alerts
escalation depends on the AI deciding to escalate
ambiguous actions are not clearly blocked or routed to approval
fallback allows workflow to continue if manager is unavailable
